webui_payload_desc: Shows the last byte/token payload sent to the LLM model. Disabling heavy plugins (WebCam, Browser, etc.) reduces memory usage and costs.
webui_payload_preview_ph: Send a message to capture payload...
webui_agent_config_desc: Configure autonomous behavior, iterations, and tool visualization.
webui_agent_enabled_desc: Allows the AI to use multiple steps and tools to solve complex tasks.
webui_agent_max_iter_help: How many times the AI can think and use tools in a single turn.
webui_agent_verbose_desc: Emits cyan/yellow reasoning steps during the loop.
webui_agent_action_console_desc: Shows real-time terminal windows for shell commands and python scripts (Action Logger).
webui_executor_enable_desc: Master switch for all Executor capabilities: file management, shell commands, and Python sandbox.
webui_executor_sandbox_desc: The Sandbox executes Python code in a strict AST security jail. Network and filesystem access are blocked inside the sandbox.
webui_executor_timeout_hint: Maximum seconds a sandbox script is allowed to run before it is forcibly killed.
webui_executor_shell_warning: USE WITH CAUTION: Grants Hecos direct access to your system shell.
webui_executor_fm_desc: Configure safety boundaries for file read/write operations.
webui_executor_max_read_lines: Max Lines to Read per Request
webui_executor_max_read_hint: Limits how many lines the read_file tool can return in a single call.
webui_executor_workspace_hint: Directory where Python sandbox scripts are temporarily saved before execution.
